originalTitle: Making reinforcement learning sane and easy. Chill dev stream
title: Debugging CARBS Hyperparameter Sweeps for Consistent RL Training
summary: Debugged CARBS hyperparameter optimization library to prevent crashes due to duplicate suggestions and integer scaling. Implemented fixes for metric stability (using last 10% of training for evaluation) and added skill usage logging to the MOBA environment. Helped a viewer debug a breakout environment implementation.
